zh.Hemington, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾明頓
zh.Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead是Hugh Welles和Agnes的兒子，於1543年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾明頓。他於大約1560年與Hellene of Ringstead在英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1618年3月18日之前在英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德。

zh-hans.Hemington, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾明頓
zh-hans.Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead是Hugh Welles和Agnes的儿子，于1543年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾明頓。他于大约1560年与Hellene of Ringstead在英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1618年3月18日之前在英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Wells
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

variants.name: Dupuis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Armand, Cecile, Normand, Emile, Lucien, Marcel, Rosaire, Alphonse, Henri.
topographic name for someone ‘from the well’, from Old French puis ‘well’, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’. Compare Dupee , Dupuie , Dupuy 2, and Wells .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead was born in 1543, in Hemington, Northamptonshire, England as the son of Hugh Welles and Agnes. He married Hellene of Ringstead about 1560, in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died before 18 March 1618, in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England, and was buried in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead est né en 1543, à Hemington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fils de Hugh Welles et Agnes. Il a épousé Hellene of Ringstead environ 1560, à Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 mars 1618, à Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead wurde 1543 in Hemington, Northamptonshire, England, als Sohn von Hugh Welles und Agnes geboren. Er hat um 1560 in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England Hellene of Ringstead geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 18. März 1618 in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead è nato il nel 1543 nel Hemington, Northamptonshire, England come figlio di Hugh Welles e Agnes. Lui sposato Hellene of Ringstead circa 1560, nel Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì prima del 18 marzo 1618, nel Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England, e fu sepolto a Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.Hemington, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヘミントン
ja.Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアド
ja.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringsteadは1543年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヘミントンでHugh WellesとAgnesの息子として生まれた。約1560年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアドでHellene of Ringsteadと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1618年3月18日以前にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアドで死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead(은)는 1543년 영국 노르섬프토실르 헤밍턴에서 Hugh Welles(와)과 Agnes의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1560년 영국 노르섬프토실르 링스테아드에서 Hellene of Ringstead(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1618년 3월 18일 이전 영국 노르섬프토실르 링스테아드에서 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 링스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead nasceu em 1543, em Hemington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filho de Hugh Welles e Agnes. Ele casou-se com Hellene of Ringstead aproximadamente 1560, em Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de março de 1618, em Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead родился в 1543 г. в местности хемингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия. Его родителей звали Hugh Welles и Agnes. Он женился на женщине по имени Hellene of Ringstead около 1560 г. в местности рингстид, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер перед 18 марта 1618 г. в местности рингстид, нортамптоншир, Англия и был похоронен в местности рингстид, нортамптоншир, Англия.

sm.from 1560 to 1570: mai le 1560 e o'o I le 1570
sm.from 1565 to 1575: mai le 1565 e o'o I le 1575

es.lifeSummary: John Wells of Ringstead nació en 1543, en Hemington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Hugh Welles y Agnes. Se casó con Hellene of Ringstead aproximadamente 1560, en Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de marzo de 1618, en Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
